# Reference Product Categories

Use categories, not copied designs.

- Dense SaaS: quiet hierarchy, stable tables, predictable sidebars, strong state handling.
- Developer tools: code/data readability, clear command surfaces, compact controls.
- Marketing product pages: inspectable product signal, strong CTA path, proof close to claims.
- Venue/local pages: real place media, hours/location/action clarity, mobile-first contact path.
- Editorial/portfolio: object/person work is visible in the first viewport.
